The 15 residual at 4f6e17c base (which is what wave-4 actually ran against) are: locale-switching(3) + spa-mode(2) + healthcheck(1) + procurement(2) + shared-components-canary(2) + cabinet(1) + apps(2) + 2 cross-spec Lingui drift tests. workers.name: locale-spa-cluster
workers.task:
Fix the 6 carry-forward e2e test-content failures in 3 specs:
- `web-modern/e2e/locale-switching.spec.ts` (3 fail out of 6 — Topbar dev switcher, locale restoration, LinguiProvider integration)
- `web-modern/e2e/spa-mode.spec.ts` (2 fail out of 4 — D1 invariants, SPA shell + JS hydrate + /app/cfo render)
- `web-modern/e2e/healthcheck.spec.ts` (1 fail out of 1)

Run `cd web-modern && START_FASTIFY=1 pnpm playwright test --reporter=line locale-switching spa-mode healthcheck` and capture failures. For each, run `--headed` ONCE to see the actual DOM, then update locators in the spec (NOT source). For locale-switching, the LinguiProvider integration test is sensitive to macro wire-up timing; rewrite to use `findByText` with `timeout: 5000`. NO source edits, NO `_helpers.ts` edits, NO `package.json`/`tsconfig.json`/`vite.config.ts` edits. Audit gates in order: (1) each spec isolated, (2) cluster vitest, (3) full vitest (≤2 pre-existing flakes), (4) typecheck, (5) i18n extract, (6) build. Use `timeout 300` on all bash. If no fixes needed, report `STATUS: NOOP-FIX-NEEDED`. Branch: wip/phase10-9-e2e-content-fixes-w5-locale-spa-cluster. Tag: phase10-9-e2e-content-fixes-w5-locale-spa-cluster-v1. Push: ant. Do NOT use mcp__claude-in-chrome__* tools. Do NOT add debug instrumentation. Do NOT spawn subagents. Wall-clock budget: 25 min per wave-4 postmortem. HARD CHECKPOINT: must checkpoint progress at T+10, T+20, T+25 even if partial.
